samples.text: Apple Inc. announced record quarterly profits driven by strong iPhone sales and growing services revenue.
NASA's James Webb Space Telescope captures stunning images of distant galaxies forming in the early universe.
The Lakers defeated the Warriors 118-112 in overtime, with LeBron James scoring 35 points.
United Nations Security Council holds emergency meeting to discuss the escalating conflict in the Middle East.
Federal Reserve raises interest rates by 0.25% to combat persistent inflation concerns.
Researchers develop new AI model that can predict protein structures with 90% accuracy.
